title: Bagek's Coat Addon - A SWEM Addon
description:
Bageks Coat Add-On

This mod extends the coats for the SWEM horse without replacing any of the original coats. This mod has been created for 1.18.2.
body:
# Bageks Coat Add-On

This mod extends the coats for the SWEM horse without replacing any of the original coats. This mod has been created for 1.18.2. If you want 1.20 SWEM has announced they will be making a custom coat section for it.


To use this mod please install this mod then use a resource pack to replace the steed coat placeholders (Or have white bases).
To replace one of the placeholder coats name your horse coat png one of the placeholder coat names in assets->bagekscoataddon->pony in your own resource pack. If you don't know how to create a Resourcepack please watch a youtube video.



 ## To know about these ponies
----------------------------------------
- Ponies do have genders and work exactly the same as SWEM horses.  
- Ponies can be bred together but will only give a SWEM Foal. They cannot be bred for only spawned in via command.  
- Ponies and SWEM horses cannot breed together.  
- Ponies when bred will give a random SWEM foal colour as the Ponies do not have colour tags. (So gamble your life away at your own risks ;) )      
- Sometimes Ponies coats will have a little render issue where they will just be black. Do not worry this is just a server render issue and re-logging a couple times/relaunching Minecraft should hopefully fix it, if it doesn't it will eventually fix in time. Please be patient, there is no other fix.  
- Tre's Library mod/resource pack & Lissa's Dressage animation pack can cause rendering issues with the steeds sometimes as well. If you want minimal issues remove the mod and resource pack.   


## Summon Command :

/summon bagekscoataddon:pony ~ ~ ~ {"Texture":"bagekscoataddon:pony/placeholder_(number).png"}
Horsecoat = png name in assets->bagekscoataddon->horse

Rename your PNG to: "placeholder_(1-50)" make sure its a .png file.

Premade Resource Pack can be downloaded from the discord
